quick_skim.title: Flow Annealing Posterior Sampling for Function-Space Regression and Inverse Problems
quick_skim.abstract: Principled regression for stochastic processes is a long-standing challenge with deep connections to scientific inverse problems. We introduce Flow Annealing Posterior Sampling (FAPS), to our knowledge the first function-space posterior sampling framework that unifies stochastic-process regression and PDE inverse problems. Built on pretrained function-space flow-matching priors, FAPS enables likelihood-guided posterior inference from sparse and noisy observations, supports variable query discretizations, and avoids explicit prior-density evaluation. Its Langevin correction uses a low-rank covariance preconditioner to exploit dominant function-space correlations across discretizations. Across Gaussian and non-Gaussian stochastic-process regression benchmarks and diverse PDE inverse problems, FAPS produces coherent posterior samples with accurate uncertainty quantification, significantly outperforming existing functional regression baselines and achieving competitive or better PDE noisy inverse performance than diffusion-based posterior samplers while reducing test-time sampling cost.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: function-space posterior sampling for inverse problems including denoising and recovery
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 用于逆问题（含去噪和恢复）的函数空间后验采样
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 用于逆问题（含去噪和恢复）的函数空间后验采样
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 用于逆问题（含去噪和恢复）的函数空间后验采样
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: A unified function-space posterior sampling method for stochastic-process regression and PDE inverse problems, enabling likelihood-guided inference from noisy observations.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对随机过程回归和偏微分方程逆问题，提出流退火后验采样框架。利用预训练流匹配先验，从稀疏含噪观测中进行似然指导的后验推断，支持变分辨率查询。采用低秩协方差预条件器加速Langevin校正。在多种随机过程反问题中验证了有效性，为高维张量数据恢复提供了可借鉴的贝叶斯方法。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对随机过程回归和偏微分方程逆问题，提出流退火后验采样框架。利用预训练流匹配先验，从稀疏含噪观测中进行似然指导的后验推断，支持变分辨率查询。采用低秩协方差预条件器加速Langevin校正。在多种随机过程反问题中验证了有效性，为高维张量数据恢复提供了可借鉴的贝叶斯方法。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: high-dimensional tensor data recovery for hyperspectral images

quick_skim.title: Scalable Operator Learning via Nyström Approximation With Denoising Applications
quick_skim.abstract: In this paper, we study Nyström subsampling for vector-valued regression in vector-valued reproducing kernel Hilbert spaces. Standard kernel methods often suffer from prohibitive computational costs due to the construction and inversion of large kernel matrices, which limits their scalability to large datasets. To overcome this bottleneck, we propose an efficient operator learning algorithm based on Nyström subsampling that accommodates functional outputs. Under general source conditions characterized by index functions-extending beyond the classical Hölder-type and operator-monotone frameworks-we establish minimax-optimal convergence rates for the proposed estimator. As an application of the proposed framework, we consider function denoising problems. Unlike classical denoising methods, which are typically tailored to specific signal representations or noise models, our approach formulates denoising within a general operator learning framework. Numerical experiments on signal denoising, real-time audio denoising, image denoising, inverse Radon transform reconstruction, and energy-efficiency prediction confirm that the proposed method achieves performance comparable to full kernel methods while substantially reducing computational cost.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: scalable operator learning with denoising application
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 可扩展算子学习及其去噪应用
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 可扩展算子学习及其去噪应用
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 可扩展算子学习及其去噪应用
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes Nyström-based scalable operator learning with minimax-optimal rates, applied to function denoising.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对核方法在大规模数据上的计算瓶颈，提出基于Nyström采样的可扩展算子学习算法，在更广的源条件下达到极小极大最优收敛率，并将方法应用于函数去噪，为高光谱图像去噪提供了高效的算子学习工具。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对核方法在大规模数据上的计算瓶颈，提出基于Nyström采样的可扩展算子学习算法，在更广的源条件下达到极小极大最优收敛率，并将方法应用于函数去噪，为高光谱图像去噪提供了高效的算子学习工具。
